creator: sergey.koupreyenko@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 228398
Patch to src/hotplug_libusb.c source file

PCSC daemon has memory leak while using libusb even when there are no USB card connected.

The attached patch solves the problem. It has been tested on the FreeBSD 12.2-STABLE, amd64, main branch of the ports tree.
